burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; morbidity from hyperthyroidism and ophthalmopathy

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Suppressed TSH with elevated free T4/T3; positive TRAb; uptake scan when needed

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with access to antithyroid therapy and definitive treatment

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Lab testing and uptake scans widely available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Antithyroid drugs, beta-blockers, radioiodine or surgery; ophthalmopathy management
